title: Preparation, Deparaffinization, Antigen Retrieval and Staining of Human FFPE Kidney Tissue for Akoya Phenocycler Fusion Multiplex Analysis- Indiana University
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"uv3mw","text":"This protocol describes the method for preparation and staining of FFPE kidney tissue on slides for Akoya Phenocycler-Fusion multiplex staining using barcoded antibodies. Included are the protocols for tissue preparation, sectioning, deparaffinization, antigen retrieval and tissue staining.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9kqy0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"hqqbw","text":"Purpose: Prepare FFPE tissue and perform multiplex antibody staining for Akoya Phenocycler-Fusion Imaging.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"n0mj4","text":"Procedure:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"v6vau","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ac439","text":"Tissue Cutting:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9uvxg","text":"1) 5 µm sections are cut on Leica Histocore microtome and mounted on Fisher Superfrost Plus Gold slides (2x75mm) by floating on 42 °C water bath.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cd6lf","text":"2) Slides are dried by propping at ~75° slant over-night on Kimwipes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ejjzg","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"hdev5","text":"Deparaffinization and Antigen Retrieval:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":40}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"jilb6","text":"3) When ready to deparaffinize, dry slide(s) at 60 °C on slide dryer for 1 hr.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"btjvi","text":"4) Slides are deparaffinized and antigens retrieved according to Akoya Phenocycler Fusion User Guide v2.1.0 (https://www.akoyabio.com/support/) with xylene substituted for HistoChoice Clearing Agent:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7h9eh","text":"   a. steps: 5 µm sections are cut on Leica Histocore microtome and mounted on Fisher Superfrost Plus Gold slides (2x75mm) by floating on 42 °C water bath.
Slides are dried by propping at ~75° slant over-night on Kimwipes.
When ready to deparaffinize, dry slide(s) at 60 °C on slide dryer for 1 hr.
Slides are deparaffinized and antigens retrieved according to Akoya Phenocycler Fusion User Guide v2.1.0 (https://www.akoyabio.com/support/) with xylene substituted for HistoChoice Clearing Agent:
Sequentially dip paraffin section slides in vertical slide holder in ~250 mL of the following fresh solvent solutions:
100% Xylenes – 10 min
100% Xylenes – 10 min
100% Xylenes – 10 min
100% Ethanol/Reagent Alcohol – 10 min
100% Ethanol/Reagent Alcohol – 10 min
100% Ethanol/Reagent Alcohol – 10 min
90% Ethanol/Reagent Alcohol – 5 min
70% Ethanol/Reagent Alcohol – 5 min
50% Ethanol/Reagent Alcohol – 5 min
30% Ethanol/Reagent Alcohol – 5 min
ddH2O – 5 min
Citrate antigen retrieval buffer - while pressure cooker heats up (~10-15 min.)

Antigen retrieval is carried out by incubating slides in slide rack (covered with aluminum foil and lid) with citrate buffer in a TintoRetriever pressure cooker with 1 L ddH2O at a setting of 115 °C for 15 minutes.
After pressure comes down, remove slide rack with slide(s) and cool on bench top for 30 min.
Move slide(s) to coplin jar with 40 mL ddH2O and incubate for 5 min.
Move slide(s) to coplin jar filled with 1X PBS (pH 7.2) and incubate for 2 min.
Move slide(s) to a second coplin jar filled with 1X PBS (pH 7.2) and incubate for 2 min.
Move slide(s) to coplin jar with 40 mL 1X Akoya Fusion Hydration buffer and incubate for 2 min.
Move slide(s) to second coplin jar with 40 mL 1X Akoya Fusion Hydration buffer and incubate for 2 min.
Move slide(s) to coplin jar with 40 mL 1X Akoya Staining buffer and incubate for 20-30 min while preparing Antibody Staining Cocktail.
Prepare a solution of Phenocycler Fusion Antibody Cocktail Solution (400 µL for each slide) according to Akoya FFPE protocol with previously developed conjugated antibody panel:
Add up the total volume of conjugated Phenocycler antibodies needed for staining each sample and remove that volume from the 400 µL of prepared Blocking buffer.
Add the appropriate volume of each antibody in the panel to the remaining blocking buffer solution.
Remove slide(s) from coplin jar, dry edges around tissue and slide back with kimwipe and place upright in humidity chamber.
Add 400 µL of Antibody Cocktail solution to tissue sections of each slide and incubate overnight at 4 °C.
The following day, remove slide(s) from humidity chamber to a coplin jar with 40 mL of Phenocycler Staining buffer and incubate for 2 min.
Move slide(s) to second coplin jar with 40 mL Staining buffer and incubate for 2 min.
Move slide(s) to a coplin jar with 40 mL 1.6% PFA in Phenocycler Storage Buffer and incubate for 10 min.
Wash slide(s) in coplin jar with 40 mL 1X PBS by dipping 3 times.
Repeat washes with 3 dips in coplin jar with 1X PBS two more times.
Transfer slide(s) to a coplin jar with 40 mL ice-cold methanol and incubate for 5 min on ice.
Wash slide(s) 3X in coplin jars with 40 mL 1X PBS by dipping 3 times as above.
Leave slide(s) in last 1X PBS wash and prepare Phenocycler Final Fixative solution by adding 20 µL Phenocycler Fixative Reagent to 1 mL 1X PBS.
Remove slide(s) from 1X PBS, dry back and edges with Kimwipe, and place in humidity chamber.
Add ~400 µL Fixative solution to the tissue on each slide and incubate for 20 min at room temperature.
Remove the slide(s) from humidity chamber and repeat 3X washes in coplin jars with 1X PBS as above, dipping 3 times in each jar.
Transfer slides to coplin jar with 40 mL Phenocycler Storage buffer or begin process of imaging according to Akoya Phenocycler Fusion Manual.
creator: William S. Bowen
